welcome.greeting_prefix: Hi. We’re happy to see you on

home.title: Home
home.bot_greeting_suffix: What would you like to do?
home.bot_pay_or_receive: Sure, do you pay or receive?
home.bot_wizard_or_expert: Do you continue with the wizard or switch to the Expert version?
home.bot_see_deal_filter: Sure, which deals would you like to view?

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.empty_pending: Deals waiting on your approval will appear here.
transactions.empty_created: Deals you've funded but the recipient hasn't accepted yet will appear here.
transactions.empty_disputed: Open disputes — yours or those you arbitrate — will appear here.

dispute.title: Dispute
dispute.intro: If you and your counterparty disagree on whether the deal was fulfilled, you can escalate to a panel of arbitrators. Each arbitrator votes; the majority decision releases or refunds the funds.
dispute.deal_not_found: We couldn't find that deal under your principal.
dispute.evidence_hint: PDF, JPG or PNG · 10 MB max
dispute.reason_placeholder: Describe the dispute in a few sentences.
dispute.open_warning_title: Heads up — opening a dispute locks the deal
dispute.open_warning_body: The escrow remains frozen until a panel of arbitrators decides, or you and the counterparty agree out-of-band via Withdraw. An arbitration fee is deducted from the deal amount when the dispute is opened.
dispute.outcome_settled: The panel ruled in favour of the recipient — funds released.
dispute.outcome_refunded: The panel ruled in favour of the payer — funds refunded.
dispute.outcome_no_quorum: The panel didn't reach quorum — funds refunded to the payer (status quo).
dispute.outcome_withdrawn_settled: Both parties agreed to release the funds to the recipient.
dispute.outcome_withdrawn_refunded: Both parties agreed to refund the funds to the payer.
dispute.withdraw_description: Both parties can avoid arbitration costs by agreeing on the outcome directly. The dispute closes (with a reduced arbitrator fee) as soon as both proposals match.
dispute.vote_description: Voting is latest-wins until the deadline. Pick the outcome you believe the evidence supports.
dispute.vote_cc_description: The recipient delivered — release the funds to them.
dispute.vote_ic_description: The recipient did not deliver — refund the payer.
dispute.vote_abstain_description: Decline to vote on this dispute (still counts toward your panel-assignment record).
dispute.finalize_description: The voting window has closed. Anyone can finalize to tally the votes, settle the deal, and pay out arbitrators.
dispute.evidence_empty: No evidence has been submitted yet.
dispute.evidence_add_description: Add a note, an off-canister artefact URL, or both. URLs require a SHA-256 hash for tamper-evidence.
dispute.evidence_url_hint: Where the supporting file lives off-canister (max 2 KiB).
dispute.evidence_hash_hint: 64 lowercase hex characters of the artefact's SHA-256 digest.
dispute.evidence_hash_invalid: SHA-256 must be exactly 64 hex characters.
dispute.evidence_hash_required: An artefact URL must be paired with its SHA-256 hash.
dispute.evidence_required: Add at least a note or an artefact URL before submitting.

arbitrator.title: Profile
arbitrator.subtitle: Arbitrator
arbitrator.not_registered_description: Arbitrator panels are admin-curated. Reach out to a canister controller if you'd like to be added.
arbitrator.assigned_empty_description: When a new dispute is opened and you're selected for the panel, it'll show up here.
arbitrator.deregister_confirm: Deregister yourself? Existing assignments will still expect a vote — missing a vote counts as Abstain. Re-entering the pool requires an admin re-registration.

admin.title: Profile
admin.subtitle: Admin
admin.controller_warning: Admin actions only succeed when called by a canister controller. Non-controllers will see a NotAuthorised error.
admin.register_description: Adds the principal to the eligible arbitrator pool. Idempotent — calling for an existing principal reactivates a Suspended or Deregistered profile.
admin.list_empty_description: Use the form above to register the first arbitrator.
admin.invalid_principal: That doesn't look like a valid principal.

detail.title: Deal {id}
detail.not_found: We couldn't find this deal under your principal.

profile.title: Profile
profile.avatar_sheet_description: Take a new photo, pick one from your device, or use the avatar generated from your principal.
profile.avatar_camera_hint: Center yourself in the frame, then capture.
profile.avatar_camera_unavailable: We couldn't open your camera. Try choosing a photo from your library instead.
profile.avatar_camera_denied: Camera access is blocked. Allow it in your browser settings or choose a photo from your library instead.
profile.avatar_camera_unsupported: Your browser doesn't support in-page camera capture. Please choose a photo from your library instead.
profile.avatar_too_large: That image is too big. Please pick a smaller photo.
profile.avatar_invalid: We couldn't read that file. Please try another image.
profile.edit_save_error: Couldn't save the profile. Please try again.

deals.empty_description: Create your first escrow deal to lock funds against a recipient or share a tip link.

create.title: Create a deal
create.votes_panel_hint: If a dispute is opened, this many arbitrators will review the case. The choice is locked into the deal terms — your counterparty sees it before consenting.
create.upload_caption: Zip, Jpg or Pdf — Maximum files 10 MB

share.title: Share your deal
share.description: Send this link or QR code to the recipient. They can claim the funds at any time before the deal expires.
share.no_share_needed: This deal has a known recipient — no share link is needed.
share.qr_alt: QR code linking to the claim page

claim.title: Claim your deal
claim.missing_code: No claim code in the URL — if this deal is bound to your principal you can still accept it; otherwise ask the sender for the full link.
claim.signin_description: PandaMe needs to know your principal before it can release the funds to you.
claim.settled_description: The funds have been released to your principal.

errors.panel_size_out_of_range: Panel size {got} is not allowed. Choose an odd value between {min} and {max}.
errors.amount_below_minimum: Amount is too small for this deal. Minimum: {min}.
errors.dispute_reserve_required: Could not pull your dispute reserve from your wallet. Make sure you have enough balance and try again.
errors.unsupported_asset: This settlement asset is not supported yet.
